name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union in Bakersfield, CA at 5700 Stockdale Hwy offers check cashing and money transfer services 7 days a week.
description_long:
Located at 5700 Stockdale Hwy in Bakersfield, CA, this Western Union location is a standalone check-cashing and money transfer service. The Bakersfield branch operates consistently throughout the week, welcoming customers from Monday through Sunday from 8 AM to 8 PM, making it convenient for those with various schedules.

At this Bakersfield Western Union, customers can cash checks, send money transfers internationally and domestically, and access other financial services. For specific information about fees, service options, or to confirm availability, call +1 661-328-6950 during operating hours.

If you're a Bakersfield resident needing quick check cashing or reliable money transfer services, bring a valid photo ID and any checks or transfer information. This location provides fast service for urgent financial needs in the CA area.
pros: 24/7 online transaction initiation through WU.com with flexible in-store payment timing
Extensive agent network across major retailers like Walmart, Safeway, and City Market for convenient cash pickup
Multilingual support in 6+ languages including English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Comprehensive service menu including money transfers, money orders, bill payment, mobile top-up, and inmate payments
Western Union Rewards loyalty program for frequent users
Built-in transfer tracking system for monitoring payment status
Mobile app and prepaid card options for digital-first customers
cons: Transfer fees and exchange rates not transparently displayed on the homepage, requiring site navigation or agent contact
Service delays reported (e.g., Orange Wallet in Cameroon delays visible on current website)
Cash pickup limited by agent location hours; not truly 24/7 despite online availability
No traditional banking products like checking, savings accounts, or lines of credit
Historical reputation for high fees relative to newer fintech money transfer competitors
best_for: Immigrants and families sending international remittances to relatives abroad
Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional checking accounts
Customers needing convenience of retail locations like Walmart or Safeway for money services
Users requiring multilingual support in languages beyond English
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international remittance senders who prioritize convenience of retail location access over competitive pricing. The primary caveat is that fees and exchange rates are not transparent on the homepage and may be higher than newer fintech alternatives; customers should compare costs before sending large amounts.
services: Domestic money transfers (send and pick up cash)
Online money transfer initiation via WU.com
Receiver management and delivery method updates
meta_description: Western Union at 5700 Stockdale Hwy, Bakersfield, CA. Check cashing and money transfers daily 8 AM-8 PM.
